title: Malformed UTF16 leads to a 2-byte buffer overread
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), value BLOB, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES (NULL, X'FFFE004200610061');
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('Test', X'FFFE0042006100');
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE test_table SET name = 'Updated' WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name IS NULL LIMIT 1);
